blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,070 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 57.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 46" over the past week. Current depth: 62".
